title: Cross board Project approvals with VLOOKUP on monday.com

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Creating a seamless approval process for projects where there is a different approving manager for different type of tasks is challenging.

VLOOKUP for monday helped solving this by creating a repository board matching between approving managers to projects and tasks that can be updated from one centralized board and by Auto-connecting the repository board to multiple project boards.

Here is a short demo Video. Need help setting VLOOKUP up on your boards. Contact us appsupport@jetpackapps.co

posts.author: asafm (Asaf)
posts.cookedHtml: What are the limitations to the free plan?

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml: @asafm connecting up to 2 boards is available in VLOOKUP free plan
